w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: good morning/afternoon. my name is <name> and I work with <organization>. we are working on
a multi-purpose cash transfer (MPC) to households in this area. the purpose of this survey is to
collect information about the MPC beneficiaries living conditions & coping mechanisms, experience
with MPC transfer targeting, amount of cash distributed, distribution process, satisfaction on the
cash assistance support and impact of MPC on the lives of the affected communities and challenges
you are selected randomly for this survey and your participation in the survey is based on your
willingness to take part and your answers will not change your eligibility for future assistance. the
information we collected will be kept confidential. there are no "right" and "wrong" answers to the
questions I will ask. there is no benefit or payment for your participation in the interview. you may
decline to answer any questions or stop the interview at any time. the interview will take about 20
<value>Part I. Interviewer (data collector's) and respondent's information</value>
<value>1. ARE YOU THE HEAD OF THE HOUSEHOLD?</value>
<value form="markdown">1. ARE YOU THE HEAD OF THE HOUSEHOLD?</value>
<value>4. IS THE HEAD OF HOUSEHOLD A CHILD (I.E. BELOW 18 YEARS OLD)?</value>
<value form="markdown">4. IS THE HEAD OF HOUSEHOLD A CHILD (I.E. BELOW 18 YEARS OLD)?</value>
<value>5. IS THE HEADHOUSEHOLD IS BY AN ELDERLY (I.E. 60+ YEARS OLD)?</value>
<value form="markdown">5. IS THE HEADHOUSEHOLD IS BY AN ELDERLY (I.E. 60+ YEARS OLD)?</value>
<value>6. IS THE HEAD OF HOUSEHOLD INJURED, WITH DISABILITY AND/OR CHRONICALLY ILL?
<value form="markdown">6. IS THE HEAD OF HOUSEHOLD INJURED, WITH DISABILITY AND/OR CHRONICALLY ILL?
<value>7. HOUSEHOLD HAS AT LEAST ONE VULNERABLE MEMBER
(elderly/ dependent/ injured person or person with disability /chronically ill/pregnant (lactating) women)
<value form="markdown">7. HOUSEHOLD HAS AT LEAST ONE VULNERABLE MEMBER
(elderly/ dependent/ injured person or person with disability /chronically ill/pregnant (lactating) women)
(How many people are living in the household in the current location?)</value>
(How many people are living in the household in the current location?)</value>
<value>10. IS THIS A LARGE HOUSEHOLD (OVER 7 MEMBERS)?</value>
<value form="markdown">10. IS THIS A LARGE HOUSEHOLD (OVER 7 MEMBERS)?</value>
<value>11. CWG - MY HOUSEHOLD LIVES IN A COLLECTIVE SHELTER/ABANDONED AND/OR DAMAGED
BUILDING/TENT/TARP/UNDER TREES/CAVE OR EQUIVALENT POOR LIVING SITUATION THAT IS UNFIT FOR LIVING</value>
<value form="markdown">11. CWG - MY HOUSEHOLD LIVES IN A COLLECTIVE SHELTER/ABANDONED AND/OR DAMAGED
BUILDING/TENT/TARP/UNDER TREES/CAVE OR EQUIVALENT POOR LIVING SITUATION THAT IS UNFIT FOR LIVING</value>
<value>12. CWG- MY HOUSEHOLD DOES NOT OWN ANY INCOME-GENERATING ASSETS
(assets that make money such as livestock that produce milk/cheese, machinery that produces items to sell)</value>
<value form="markdown">12. CWG- MY HOUSEHOLD DOES NOT OWN ANY INCOME-GENERATING ASSETS
(assets that make money such as livestock that produce milk/cheese, machinery that produces items to sell)</value>
<value>13. CWG - WHATWAS YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S INCOME IN ETB IN THE PREVIOUS MONTH BEFORE RECEIVING MPC?</value>
<value form="markdown">13. CWG - WHATWAS YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S INCOME IN ETB IN THE PREVIOUS MONTH BEFORE RECEIVING MPC?</value>
<value>14. CWG- DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD RECEIVE ANY OTHER CASH/FOOD BASKET/ NON-FOOD ITEM ASSISTANCE IN THE
<value form="markdown">14. CWG- DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD RECEIVE ANY OTHER CASH/FOOD BASKET/ NON-FOOD ITEM ASSISTANCE IN THE
<value>14A. If your answer for the above question is yes, please provide details</value>
<value>15. CWG - HAVE YOU OR ANYONE IN YOUR HOUSEHOLD RECEIVED SAFETY NET PAYMENTS FROM THE GOVERNMENT
<value form="markdown">15. CWG - HAVE YOU OR ANYONE IN YOUR HOUSEHOLD RECEIVED SAFETY NET PAYMENTS FROM THE GOVERNMENT
<value>16. CWG - BEFORE RECEIVING THE CASH ASSISTANCE, WHAT WAS YOUR HOUSEHOLD COPING STRATEGIES?</value>
<value form="markdown">16. CWG - BEFORE RECEIVING THE CASH ASSISTANCE, WHAT WAS YOUR HOUSEHOLD COPING STRATEGIES?</value>
<value>Rely on less expensive and lower quality food</value>
<value>Restrict food consumption by adults in order for small children to eat</value>
<value>Engage school age children (6-15 years) in income generation</value>
<value>Reduce essential non-food expenditures such as education/health</value>
<value>Sell productive assets or means of transport</value>
<value>17. CWG -AFTER RECEIVING THE CASH ASSISTANCE, WHAT WAS YOUR HOUSEHOLD COPING STRATEGIES?</value>
<value form="markdown">17. CWG -AFTER RECEIVING THE CASH ASSISTANCE, WHAT WAS YOUR HOUSEHOLD COPING STRATEGIES?</value>
<value>Rely on less expensive and lower quality food</value>
<value>Restrict food consumption by adults in order for small children to eat</value>
<value>Engage school age children (6-15 years) in income generation</value>
<value>Reduce essential non-food expenditures such as education/health</value>
<value>Sell productive assets or means of transport</value>
<value>18. CWG - HOW MANY TIMES DID YOUR HOUSEHOLDS RECEIVE MULTIPURPOSE CASH?</value>
<value form="markdown">18. CWG - HOW MANY TIMES DID YOUR HOUSEHOLDS RECEIVE MULTIPURPOSE CASH?</value>
<value>18A. CWG FIRST CASH DISTRIBUTION- WHICH MONTH DID IT HAPPEN?</value>
<value>19. CWG - HOW MUCH (IN ETB) DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD ACTUALLY RECEIVE MONTHLY THROUGH YOUR MULTIPURPOSE
(Note to enumerator: Include ONLY the last round of payment)</value>
<value form="markdown">19. CWG - HOW MUCH (IN ETB) DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD ACTUALLY RECEIVE MONTHLY THROUGH YOUR MULTIPURPOSE
(Note to enumerator: Include ONLY the last round of payment)</value>
<value>20. CWG - WHO MAKES DECISION ON THE USE OF THE CASH RECIEVED?</value>
<value form="markdown">20. CWG - WHO MAKES DECISION ON THE USE OF THE CASH RECIEVED?</value>
<value>22 ONG - WHAT ARE THE TOP 5 ITEMS YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND MONEY ON?
<value>22A. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON FOOD</value>
<value>22B. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON MEDICAL EXPENSE/HEALTHCARE</value>
<value form="markdown">22B. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON MEDICAL EXPENSE/HEALTHCARE</value>
<value>22C. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON WATER, SANITATION AND HYGIEN?</value>
<value form="markdown">22C. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON WATER, SANITATION AND HYGIEN?</value>
<value>22D. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON EDUCATION</value>
<value form="markdown">22D. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON EDUCATION</value>
<value>22E. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON SHELTER REPAIRE</value>
<value form="markdown">22E. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON SHELTER REPAIRE</value>
<value>22F. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON RENT</value>
<value form="markdown">22F. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON RENT</value>
<value>22G. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON NON FOOD ITEMS</value>
<value form="markdown">22G. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON NON FOOD ITEMS</value>
<value>22H. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON CLOTHING/SHOE</value>
<value form="markdown">22H. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON CLOTHING/SHOE</value>
<value>22I. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON DEPT REPAYMENT</value>
<value form="markdown">22I. CWG WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON DEPT REPAYMENT</value>
<value>22J. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON CHILDCARE</value>
<value form="markdown">22J. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON CHILDCARE</value>
<value>22K. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON ELECTRICITY(INCLUDING)</value>
<value form="markdown">22K. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON ELECTRICITY(INCLUDING)</value>
<value>22L. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON TRANSPORT</value>
<value form="markdown">22L. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON TRANSPORT</value>
<value>22M. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON Fuel (Wood, Paraffin, Charcoal Etc)</value>
<value form="markdown">22M. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON Fuel (Wood, Paraffin, Charcoal Etc)</value>
<value>22N. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON Livestock and livestock inputs (e.g., fodder)</value>
<value form="markdown">22N. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON Livestock and livestock inputs (e.g., fodder)</value>
<value>22O. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON Agricultural inputs (seeds, crops, tools)</value>
<value form="markdown">22O. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON Agricultural inputs (seeds, crops, tools)</value>
<value>22P. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON Invest in savings.</value>
<value form="markdown">22P. CWG: WHAT ESTIMATED AMOUNT DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD SPEND ON Invest in savings.</value>
<value>23. CWG - WERE YOU ABLE TO MEET All YOUR PRIORITY NEEDS WITH MPC CASH ASSIATNCE</value>
<value form="markdown">23. CWG - WERE YOU ABLE TO MEET All YOUR PRIORITY NEEDS WITH MPC CASH ASSIATNCE</value>
<value>23A. CWG - IF YOUR RESPONSE TO Q 23 IS "NO'', HOW MUCH OF WHAT YOU RECIEVED THIS MONTH WAS SPENT ON MEETING YOUR PRIORITY NEDS</value>
<value form="markdown">23A. CWG - IF YOUR RESPONSE TO Q 23 IS "NO'', HOW MUCH OF WHAT YOU RECIEVED THIS MONTH WAS SPENT ON MEETING YOUR PRIORITY NEDS</value>
<value>23B. CWG - IF YOUR RESPONSE TO Q 23 IS "Yes'', THEN WHICH TOP FIVE PRIORITY BASIC NEED IS YOUR HOSEHOLD CURRENTLY UNABLE TO MEET?</value>
<value form="markdown">23B. CWG - IF YOUR RESPONSE TO Q 23 IS "Yes'', THEN WHICH TOP FIVE PRIORITY BASIC NEED IS YOUR HOSEHOLD CURRENTLY UNABLE TO MEET?</value>
<value>24. CWG -ARE YOU CURRENTLY OWING ANY DEBT OR HAVE YOU RECENTLY REPAIRED DEBTS?</value>
<value form="markdown">24. CWG -ARE YOU CURRENTLY OWING ANY DEBT OR HAVE YOU RECENTLY REPAIRED DEBTS?</value>
<value>25. CWG: IF YOUR HOUSEHOLD REPAID A DEPT USING MULTIPURPOSE CASH, WHAT WAS THE REASON FOR INCURRING THE DEPT</value>
<value form="markdown">25. CWG: IF YOUR HOUSEHOLD REPAID A DEPT USING MULTIPURPOSE CASH, WHAT WAS THE REASON FOR INCURRING THE DEPT</value>
<value>26. CWG: IF YOUR HOUSEHOLD REPIAD DEPT USING THE MULTIPURPOSE CASH, WITH WHOM WERE YOU IN DEPT?</value>
<value form="markdown">26. CWG: IF YOUR HOUSEHOLD REPIAD DEPT USING THE MULTIPURPOSE CASH, WITH WHOM WERE YOU IN DEPT?</value>
<value>26A. CWG - IF "OTHER'', IN Q26, PLEAASE SPEC"·</value>
<value>27. CMG - WHAT ARE THE TOP 3 MOST IMPORTANT OUTCOMES/IMPACT OF RECEIVING THE MULTIPURPOSE CASH TO
<value form="markdown">27. CMG - WHAT ARE THE TOP 3 MOST IMPORTANT OUTCOMES/IMPACT OF RECEIVING THE MULTIPURPOSE CASH TO
<value>Improved the quantity and/or the quality of our food consumption</value>
<value>Invested in productive assets for income generation</value>
<value>28. CWG - DOES YOUR HOUSEHOLD HAVE ANY NEEDS THAT REMAIN UNMET?</value>
<value form="markdown">28. CWG - DOES YOUR HOUSEHOLD HAVE ANY NEEDS THAT REMAIN UNMET?</value>
<value>28A. CWG - IF "YES OR NOT SURE", WHAT ARE THE REMAINING UNMET NEEDS?</value>
<value>29. ONG - WHY WAS YOUR HOUSEHOLD UNABLE TO OBTAIN THOSE ITEMS/FULFILL NEEDS?</value>
<value form="markdown">29. ONG - WHY WAS YOUR HOUSEHOLD UNABLE TO OBTAIN THOSE ITEMS/FULFILL NEEDS?</value>
<value>Needed items not available in the market</value>
<value>Market inaccessible due to harsh weather conditions</value>
<value>Market inaccessible due to safety issues in travel</value>
<value>Market inaccessible due to unsafe market location</value>
<value>29A. CWG - IF "OTHER" IN Q29, PLEASE SPECIFY:</value>
<value>30. CWG -ASIDE FROM MULTIPURPOSE CASH RECEIVED, DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD MEET SOME OF YOUR NEEDS BY
<value form="markdown">30. CWG -ASIDE FROM MULTIPURPOSE CASH RECEIVED, DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD MEET SOME OF YOUR NEEDS BY
<value>30A. CWG - IF YES, IN WHICH OTHER WAY(S)?</value>
<value>31. CWG - DO YOU UNDERSTAND WHY YOUR HOUSEHOLD WAS SELECTED TO RECEIVE THE MULTIPURPOSE CASH
<value form="markdown">31. CWG - DO YOU UNDERSTAND WHY YOUR HOUSEHOLD WAS SELECTED TO RECEIVE THE MULTIPURPOSE CASH
<value>31A. CWG - IF "YES" IN Q31, DO YOU REMEMBER WHICH CRITERIA YOUR HOUSEHOLD MET?</value>
<value>My household is headed by a widow</value>
<value>My household is headed by a child (i.e. below 18 years old)</value>
<value>My household is headed by an elderly (i.e. 60+ years old)</value>
<value>My household Is headed by/has a member who is with disability</value>
<value>My household has two or more members with disability</value>
<value>My household has women with lots of children</value>
<value>My household has people with chronic illness</value>
<value>31 B. CWG - IF "NO" IN Q31, WHY? (SELECT ALL THAT APPLY)</value>
<value form="markdown">31 B. CWG - IF "NO" IN Q31, WHY? (SELECT ALL THAT APPLY)</value>
<value>No one explained the selection criteria to our household</value>
<value>The criteria were communicated to the other member of our household instead</value>
<value>I cannot recall if the criteria were communicated to our household</value>
<value>31 C. CWG - IF "OTHER" IN Q31 B, PLEASE SPECIFY:</value>
<value>32. CWG - WAS YOUR HOUSEHOLD INFORMED ABOUT THE CASH COLLECTION/DISTRIBUTION PROCESS?</value>
<value form="markdown">32. CWG - WAS YOUR HOUSEHOLD INFORMED ABOUT THE CASH COLLECTION/DISTRIBUTION PROCESS?</value>
<value>RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S SATISFACTION LEVEL BEFORE THECASH COLLECTION Fully disagree(1) Somewhat(2) Neither agree or nor disagree(3) Somewhat(4) Fully agree(5)</value>
<value>33A. CWG - THE REGISTRATION PROCESS WAS SIMPLE</value>
<value>33B. CWG - THE REGISTRATION PROCESS WAS CLEARLY EXPLAINED.</value>
ON TIME NEEDS TO BE DEFINEDWHAT
<value>33D. WE WERE INFORMED EARLY ABOUT THE CASH DISTRIBUTION DETAILS</value>
<value form="markdown">34. CWG - RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S 1 2 3 4 s
<value>HOUSEHOLD'S SATISFACTION LEVEL IN THE PROCESSES INVOLVED
<value>35. CWG - THROUGH WHICH METHOD DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD RECEIVE THE CASH DISTRIBUTION?</value>
<value form="markdown">35. CWG - THROUGH WHICH METHOD DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD RECEIVE THE CASH DISTRIBUTION?</value>
<value>Cash in hand using LMMS {Last Miles Mobile Solution),</value>
<value>Mobile Money Transfer (in areas used by some partners)</value>
<value>RATE YOU HOUSEHOLD'S SATISFACTION LEVEL DURING THE CASH COLLECTION (Yes No No Opinion) 36. CWG - PLEASE USE THE CRITERIA Yes No No Opinion BELOW TO RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S
<value form="markdown">RATE YOU HOUSEHOLD'S SATISFACTION LEVEL DURING THE CASH COLLECTION (Yes No No Opinion) 36. CWG - PLEASE USE THE CRITERIA Yes No No Opinion BELOW TO RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S
<value>36. CWG - PLEASE USE THE CRITERIA BELOW TO RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S SATISFACTION LEVEL DURING THE
<value form="markdown">36. CWG - PLEASE USE THE CRITERIA BELOW TO RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S SATISFACTION LEVEL DURING THE
<value>36A. CWG - THERE WAS NO DELAY IN THE DISTRIBUTION OF CASH</value>
<value>36B. CWG - THERE WERE SEPARATE LINES FOR MALES AND FEMALES</value>
<value>36C. CWG - HOUSEHOLD INFORMATION WAS CORRECT ON THE
<value>36D. CWG - WAS THERE ANY DEMAND OF BRIBE/TAX AT THE DISTRIBUTION
<value>36E. CWG - THE COLLECTION CENTRE WAS CLOSE BY/ NO OR MINIMAL
<value>36F. CWG - THE WAITING TIME FOR THE DISTRIBUTION WAS SHORT</value>
<value>36G. CWG - THE COLLECTION SITE PROVIDED ADEQUATE SHELTER
<value>37. TO WHAT EXTENT YOUR HOUSEHOLD AGREE WITH EACH OF
<value form="markdown">37. TO WHAT EXTENT YOUR HOUSEHOLD AGREE WITH EACH OF
<value>37A. CWG - THE JOURNEY TO THE COLLECTION SITE WAS SAFE</value>
<value>37B. CWG - THE PERSON WHO COLLECTED THE MULTIPURPOSE
<value>37C. CWG - THE REGISTRATION PROCESS WAS TIMELYON TIME NEEDS TO BE DEFINEDWHAT DO WE MEAN BY ON TIME</value>
<value>37D. CWG - THERE WAS NO OVERCROWDING DURING
<value>37E. CWG - STAFF MEMBER(S) WHO ASSISTED WITH THE CASH
OVERALL SATISFACTION LEVEL IN THEMETHOD USED DURING CASH
<value form="markdown">38. CWG - RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S 1 2 3 4 s
OVERALL SATISFACTION LEVEL IN THEMETHOD USED DURING CASH
<value>HOUSEHOLD'S SATISFACTION LEVEL IN THE PROCESSES INVOLVED
<value>39. CWG - RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S SATISFACTION LEVEL AFTER THE CASH DISTRIBUTION:</value>
<value form="markdown">39. CWG - RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S SATISFACTION LEVEL AFTER THE CASH DISTRIBUTION:</value>
<value>40. CWG - HOW WAS THE JOURNEY BACK FROM THE DISTRIBUTION SITE?</value>
<value form="markdown">40. CWG - HOW WAS THE JOURNEY BACK FROM THE DISTRIBUTION SITE?</value>
<value>Carrying cash i felt safe on my journey back</value>
<value>Carrying cash i felt unsafe on my journey back</value>
<value>The cash was stolen on my journey back</value>
<value>41. CWG-WHERE DO YOU KEEP THE CASH ONCE YOU RECEIVED?</value>
<value form="markdown">41. CWG-WHERE DO YOU KEEP THE CASH ONCE YOU RECEIVED?</value>
<value>42. CWG - DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD FACE ANY ISSUE WHEN SPENDING THE MONEY RECEIVED?</value>
<value form="markdown">42. CWG - DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD FACE ANY ISSUE WHEN SPENDING THE MONEY RECEIVED?</value>
<value>42A. CWG - IF "YES" IN Q42, WHAT WERE THE ISSUES ENCOUNTERED?</value>
<value>The banknotes were damaged and were not accepted</value>
<value>We faced issue on how to spend the small banknotes</value>
<value>We faced issue on how to spend the large banknotes</value>
<value>Higher prices offered to recipients of Humanitarian cash</value>
<value>42B. CWG • IF "OTHER" IN Q42A, PLEASE SPECIFY:</value>
<value>43. CWG - RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S (1 2 3 4 5 OVERALL SATISFACTION LEVEL IN THE METHOD USED AFTER CASH DISTRIBUTION:</value>
<value form="markdown">43. CWG - RATE YOUR HOUSEHOLD'S (1 2 3 4 5 OVERALL SATISFACTION LEVEL IN THE METHOD USED AFTER CASH DISTRIBUTION:</value>
<value>44. CWG - DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD RECEIVE THE CASH ASSISTANCE AT AN APPROPRIATE TIME TO MEET YOUR NEEDS?</value>
<value form="markdown">44. CWG - DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD RECEIVE THE CASH ASSISTANCE AT AN APPROPRIATE TIME TO MEET YOUR NEEDS?</value>
<value>45. CWG - IF "NO" IN Q44, WHEN WOULD YOUR HOUSEHOLD HAVE PREFERRED TO HAVE RECEIVED THE MULTIPURPOSE CASH ASSISTANCE?</value>
<value form="markdown">45. CWG - IF "NO" IN Q44, WHEN WOULD YOUR HOUSEHOLD HAVE PREFERRED TO HAVE RECEIVED THE MULTIPURPOSE CASH ASSISTANCE?</value>
<value>46. CWG - WOULD YOUR HOUSEHOLD PREFER MULTIPURPOSE CASH OR A DIFFERENT MODALITY (E.G. IN-KIND, VOUCHER, SERVICE PROVISION ETC.) FOR YOUR NEEDS?</value>
<value form="markdown">46. CWG - WOULD YOUR HOUSEHOLD PREFER MULTIPURPOSE CASH OR A DIFFERENT MODALITY (E.G. IN-KIND, VOUCHER, SERVICE PROVISION ETC.) FOR YOUR NEEDS?</value>
<value>46A. CWG - IF ''YES WE PREFER MJLTIURPORPUSE CASH'' IN WHICH WAY YOUR HOUSEHOLD PREFER TO REIVE IT?</value>
<value form="markdown">46A. CWG - IF ''YES WE PREFER MJLTIURPORPUSE CASH'' IN WHICH WAY YOUR HOUSEHOLD PREFER TO REIVE IT?</value>
<value>46B. CWG -IF ''No, we prefer another modality'' WHAT WOULD YOUR HOUSEHOLD PREFER?</value>
<value>47. CWG - WHAT WOULD BE THE RISK ASSOCIATED WITH THE CASH YOU RECEIVED?</value>
<value form="markdown">47. CWG - WHAT WOULD BE THE RISK ASSOCIATED WITH THE CASH YOU RECEIVED?</value>
<value>48. CWG - IF THE RESPONSE FOR Q47 IS "OTHER", PLEASE SPECIFY:</value>
<value form="markdown">48. CWG - IF THE RESPONSE FOR Q47 IS "OTHER", PLEASE SPECIFY:</value>
<value>49. CMG - IS THE WAY YOU KEEP THE MONEY SAFE?</value>
<value form="markdown">49. CMG - IS THE WAY YOU KEEP THE MONEY SAFE?</value>
<value>49A. CWG - IF "NO" IN Q49, WHAT OPTIONS DO YOU HAVE? PLEASE SPECIFY.</value>
<value>50 CWG - DID YOU FACE OTHER TENSIONS OR PROBLEMS AMONG YOUR FRIENDS/FAMILY/NEIGHBOURS AS A CONSEQUENCE OF RECEIVING THE MULTIPURPOSE CASH ASSISTANCE?</value>
<value form="markdown">50 CWG - DID YOU FACE OTHER TENSIONS OR PROBLEMS AMONG YOUR FRIENDS/FAMILY/NEIGHBOURS AS A CONSEQUENCE OF RECEIVING THE MULTIPURPOSE CASH ASSISTANCE?</value>
<value>50A. CWG- If 'Yes' in Q50, WITH THE PREVIOUS STATEMENT,WHAT IS/ARE THE ISSUE(S)</value>
<value>Our house had a disagreement on how the money should be spent</value>
<value>Our household had a disagreement who should spend the money</value>
<value>My neighbour is not eligible for the assistance</value>
<value>Our household received the same amount as our neighbour but we are smaller/bigger household</value>
<value>My household faced discrimination as we are aid receipents</value>
<value>Our household had to share the value we received value with other households because the distributor did not have exact banknotes</value>
<value>51. CWG -WHAT OTHER ISSUES DID YOU ENCOUNTER ASSOCIATED WITH CASH?</value>
<value form="markdown">51. CWG -WHAT OTHER ISSUES DID YOU ENCOUNTER ASSOCIATED WITH CASH?</value>
<value>51A. CWG IF "OTHER" IN Q51, PLEASE SPECIFY:</value>
<value form="markdown">51A. CWG IF "OTHER" IN Q51, PLEASE SPECIFY:</value>
<value>52. CWG- DID THE HUMANITARIAN ORGANISATION PROVIDE A WAY TO COMMUNICATE YOUR FEEDBACK OR COMPLAINTS RELATED TO THE ASSISTANCE
e.g. phone line, complaints desk, suggestion box)</value>
<value form="markdown">52. CWG- DID THE HUMANITARIAN ORGANISATION PROVIDE A WAY TO COMMUNICATE YOUR FEEDBACK OR COMPLAINTS RELATED TO THE ASSISTANCE
e.g. phone line, complaints desk, suggestion box)</value>
<value>52A. CWG-IF "YES" IN Q52, THROUGH WHAT CHANNEL(S) DID YOUR HOUSEHOLD COMMUNICATE YOUR FEEDBACK OR COMPLAINTS RELATED TO THE MPC ASSISTANCE </value>
<value>Compliant box( i.e. fill in a paper form)</value>
<value>52B. CWG - IF "NO" IN QS2, THROUGH WHAT CHANNEL(S) WOULD YOUR HOUSEHOLD PREFER TO COMMUNICATE YOUR FEEDBACK OR COMPLAINT RELATED TO THE ASSISTANCE?</value>
<value>Complaint box (i.e. fill in a paper form)</value>
<value>52C. CWG - IF "YES" IN Q52, DO YOU KNOW WHAT WAS DONE WITH YOUR FEEDBACK?
(This will give us an idea of the responsiveness of our mechanisms)</value>
<value>53. CWG- DO YOU HAVE ANY OTHER SUGGESTIONS FOR FEEDBACK/COMPLAINT, PARTICULARLY SOLUTION(S) FOR
<value form="markdown">53. CWG- DO YOU HAVE ANY OTHER SUGGESTIONS FOR FEEDBACK/COMPLAINT, PARTICULARLY SOLUTION(S) FOR
<value>I have now asked all of the questions. Would you like to ask any questions, or to make any comments?</value>
<value>Thank you for sharing your time and information with us today. It will help us in our work.</value>

w:settings.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du

w:fonts.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du
